_comment: [R11-3] Low-end mobile profile — Moto G4 + 4G slow throttle. Lighthouse's default mobile preset emulates a Moto G Power-class device; we use that as the round-11 baseline for lower-end Android. Thresholds are looser than desktop because mobile networks/CPUs simply are slower; they still catch real regressions (a perf score < 0.75 means something genuinely got worse, not just expected mobile overhead).
